# Modular Compliance

> Compliance management platform purpose-built for New Zealand businesses. Manage obligations under 8 NZ legislation areas — Health & Safety, AML/CFT, Privacy Act 2020, Employment Relations, Environmental, Building & Construction, Consumer Protection, and Body Corporate — from a single automated dashboard.

## About

Modular Compliance is a SaaS platform built by Instilligent Limited (NZBN: 9429051796284) that automates regulatory compliance management for New Zealand SMEs and enterprises. It replaces compliance consultants, spreadsheets, and guesswork with continuous automated monitoring, AI-surfaced priority actions, and tamper-evident 7-year audit trails.

All 8 modules are built around actual New Zealand legislation — not generic international frameworks like ISO 27001 or SOC 2. Geographic focus: New Zealand only.

## Compliance Modules

For full machine-readable module data including status, dates, and features see: https://modularcompliance.com/modules.json

### Module 1 — Health & Safety
- Legislation: Health and Safety at Work Act 2015 (HSWA 2015)
- Regulator: WorkSafe New Zealand
- Features: Hazard register & risk matrix, incident & near-miss tracking, WorkSafe notification report generation, worker engagement records, training & induction tracking with automated expiry alerts
- Status: Active

### Module 2 — AML/CFT
- Legislation: Anti-Money Laundering and Countering Financing of Terrorism Act 2009
- Regulators: Department of Internal Affairs (DIA), Financial Markets Authority (FMA), Reserve Bank of New Zealand (RBNZ)
- Features: Standard and enhanced customer due diligence (CDD), transaction monitoring with configurable thresholds, SAR & STR report generation, AML/CFT programme documentation, annual risk assessment
- Status: Active

### Module 3 — Privacy Act 2020
- Legislation: Privacy Act 2020 (NZ)
- Regulator: Office of the Privacy Commissioner
- Features: IPP compliance tracking across all 12 Information Privacy Principles, Privacy Impact Assessments, privacy breach notification workflow (72-hour timer, Privacy Commissioner notification), data inventory & flow mapping
- Status: Active

### Module 4 — Employment Relations
- Legislation: Employment Relations Act 2000, Holidays Act 2003
- Regulators: Employment Relations Authority, Labour Inspectorate
- Features: Employment agreement management, leave entitlement tracking, personal grievance workflow, minimum wage monitoring, good faith obligation documentation
- Status: Active

### Module 5 — Environmental
- Legislation: Resource Management Act 1991 (RMA)
- Regulators: Regional councils, Ministry for the Environment
- Features: Resource consent condition monitoring, emissions limit tracking, environmental incident reporting, regional council notification workflows
- Status: Active

### Module 6 — Building & Construction
- Legislation: Building Act 2004
- Regulators: MBIE, territorial authorities
- Features: Building consent tracking, code of compliance certificates, Licensed Building Practitioner (LBP) requirements, IQP obligations, Building Warrant of Fitness (BWoF) tracking
- Status: Active

### Module 7 — Consumer Protection
- Legislation: Consumer Guarantees Act 1993 (CGA), Fair Trading Act 1986 (FTA)
- Regulator: Commerce Commission
- Features: Consumer guarantees compliance, fair trading obligations, product safety notifications, returns & refund policy audit
- Status: Active

### Module 8 — Body Corporate
- Legislation: Unit Titles Act 2010
- Regulators: Tenancy Tribunal, territorial authorities
- Features: Unit title governance, body corporate rules management, AGM documentation, long-term maintenance plan compliance, BWoF tracking for shared building systems
- Status: Active

## Platform Features

- **Live Compliance Score**: Real-time aggregate score across all active modules, updated instantly as actions are completed
- **Priority Actions**: AI-surfaced compliance gaps in plain English — highest risk first
- **Automated Monitoring**: Continuous 24/7 background checks across all active frameworks; alerts before breaches, not after regulator visits
- **One-Click Audit Reports**: PDF and CSV export; regulator-ready for any date range, any module
- **7-Year Audit Trail**: Tamper-evident record of every action, document, and decision — retained automatically to meet NZ legislative requirements
- **Multi-User Teams**: Task assignment, completion tracking, compliance responsibilities across teams (5 to unlimited users)
- **Cross-Framework Gap Mapping**: Identify where obligations overlap and where gaps exist; no double-handling of shared requirements
- **Role-Based Access Control**: Available on Professional and Enterprise plans

## Pricing

All prices in NZD + GST. 14-day free trial, no credit card required.

- **Starter**: NZD 199/month — up to 5 users, 2 compliance modules of choice
- **Professional**: NZD 499/month — up to 25 users, 5 compliance modules, API access, role-based access control
- **Enterprise**: Custom pricing — unlimited users, all 8 modules + custom frameworks, dedicated account manager, 99.9% SLA

## Technology

- AI Engine: Anthropic Claude API
- Infrastructure: Railway (US-West region) + Cloudflare CDN
- Payments: Stripe
- Auth: JWT with role-based access control (RBAC)
- Marketing site: Static HTML on Cloudflare Pages

## Legal & Privacy

- Operator: Instilligent Limited (NZBN: 9429051796284)
- Governing law: New Zealand
- Privacy framework: Privacy Act 2020 — all 12 Information Privacy Principles apply
- Data storage: Railway US-West region (USA); disclosed under IPP 12
- Compliance data retention: 7 years
